mapper.sql: sa.seq, sa.browser, sa.ip_address, sa.local_name, sa.os, sa.param, sa.referer, sa.session_id, sa.url, sa.user_agent, sa.user_id, sa.user_locale,

if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND (
lower(sa.browser) LIKE CONCAT('%',lower(#{searchWord}),'%')
OR
sa.url LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
sa.referer LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
sa.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
)

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_sys_audit ( browser, ip_address, local_name, os, param, referer, session_id, url, user_agent, user_id, user_locale, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{browser}, #{ipAddress}, #{localName}, #{os}, #{param}, #{referer}, #{sessionId}, #{url}, #{userAgent}, #{userId}, #{userLocale}, now(), #{createdBy} )
